name: 42-b3yond-6ug

name: Agentica

name: Agentless

name: Alibaba
origin_basis: Alibaba Group says it was founded in Hangzhou, China, and its principal executive offices are in Hangzhou, China.

name: Alibaba Cloud / Qwen Team
origin_basis: Qwen's official About page identifies the Qwen Team and links its API to Alibaba Cloud Aliyun, so I anchor the provider to China via Alibaba Cloud.

name: Allen Institute for AI,University of Washington
origin_basis: Ai2 says it is Seattle-based and lists the University of Washington as a core partner, so the defensible country is the United States.

name: Amazon

name: Amazon Nova
origin_basis: Amazon Nova is an AWS/Amazon product, and Amazon's official headquarters materials place the company in Seattle, Washington, United States.

name: Anthropic
origin_basis: Anthropic's official submission lists its San Francisco, California address, placing the company in the United States.

name: Baidu

name: Google

origin_basis: Official Google DeepMind blog says the organization set up its headquarters in London in 2010.

name: Google DeepMind,Google
origin_basis: Google DeepMind's official About page says the organization brings together Google Brain and DeepMind, so this combined provider row is stored as multi-origin rather than forced into one country.

name: IBM

name: Korea Telecom

name: LG AI Research

name: Liquid AI

name: LongCat

name: Meta

name: Microsoft
